posts.raw_content:
Obama had 43 days experience in the Senate when he was elected President.  Leader of the free world and Commander in Chief.

I believe his Occidental and Columbia College records were not released. . His Columbia Thesis paper was not released.

His Harvard College records were not released.  His Selective Service Registration was not released.  His medical records were not released.  His Law Practice client list was not released.  A Certified Copy of his original birth certificate was not released. Neither was a signed Certification of
Live Birth released.

He had no Harvard Law Review articles published, or University of Chicago 
articles.  Neither was his Illinois State Senate records.  

He was the ultimate Manchurian candidate who literally betrayed our nation’s laws, and opened the door for our demise as a nation.  

A person with 143 days of experience couldn’t get a manager’s job at Wal-Mart.  But, he was installed as President of the most powerful nation on earth.

Go figure
